changelog: Placement test - diagnoses your level on first use
Weak areas tracking - focuses on what you get wrong
Adaptive practice banner - recommends weak categories
Fixed match exercise - two-column tap pairs
Fixed tap exercise - build phrases word by word
Fixed listen exercise - auto-speaks, pick from options
Fixed fillblank - shows sentence with blank + options
Dark mode, sound toggle, timer, PIN, shuffle
Streak freeze, hearts refill, XP boost shop
